
# 📋 Pull Request

## 📝 Description

**Brief description of changes:**

**Related Issue(s):**
Fixes #(issue_number)
Closes #(issue_number)
Related to #(issue_number)

## 🔄 Type of Change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (non-breaking change that fixes an issue)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (non-breaking change that adds functionality)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] 📚 Documentation update
- [ ] 🎨 Style/UI update (formatting, missing semi-colons, etc; no code change)
- [ ] ♻️ Code refactoring (no functional changes, no API changes)
- [ ] ⚡ Performance improvement
- [ ] 🧪 Test addition or update
- [ ] 🔧 Build configuration change
- [ ] 🔒 Security improvement

## 🚀 Features Affected

- [ ] 📊 Dashboard/Home
- [ ] 😊 Mood Tracking
- [ ] 📈 Progress Analytics
- [ ] 👤 User Profile
- [ ] 🤖 AI Insights
- [ ] 🎮 Gamification
- [ ] 🔔 Notifications
- [ ] 🔐 Authentication
- [ ] 💾 Data Management
- [ ] 🌐 Localization
- [ ] 🔒 Security/Privacy
- [ ] 📱 Navigation
- [ ] 🎨 UI Components

## 🧪 Testing

**Testing Steps:**
1. Step one
2. Step two
3. Step three

**Test Environments:**
- [ ] iOS Simulator

- [ ] Physical Android Device
- [ ] Web Browser

**Test Cases Covered:**
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Integration tests pass
- [ ] E2E tests pass (if applicable)
- [ ] Manual testing completed
- [ ] Edge cases tested
- [ ] Error handling tested

**Test Data Requirements:**
- [ ] No test data needed
- [ ] Sample user data
- [ ] Mock API responses
- [ ] Specific device configurations

## 🔒 Security & Privacy

**Security Considerations:**
- [ ] No sensitive data exposed
- [ ] Authentication checks in place
- [ ] Input validation implemented
- [ ] No security vulnerabilities introduced

**Privacy Compliance:**
- [ ] PDPA compliance maintained
- [ ] User consent handled properly
- [ ] Data encryption preserved
- [ ] No unauthorized data collection

**Data Handling:**
- [ ] Secure data storage
- [ ] Proper data transmission
- [ ] Data retention policies followed
- [ ] User data rights respected

## 🌐 Localization

**Language Support:**
- [ ] Thai language support verified
- [ ] English language support verified
- [ ] Text properly externalized
- [ ] Cultural considerations addressed
- [ ] RTL support (if applicable)

**Translation Requirements:**
- [ ] New text strings added to translation files
- [ ] Existing translations updated
- [ ] Context provided for translators
- [ ] No hardcoded text in components

## ⚡ Performance

**Performance Impact:**
- [ ] No performance regression
- [ ] Bundle size impact assessed
- [ ] Memory usage optimized
- [ ] Network requests minimized
- [ ] Loading times improved/maintained

**Performance Testing:**
- [ ] App startup time
- [ ] Screen transition performance
- [ ] Memory leak testing
- [ ] Battery usage impact
- [ ] Network performance

## 📊 Analytics & Monitoring

**Analytics:**
- [ ] New events tracked (if applicable)
- [ ] User journey mapping updated
- [ ] Conversion funnels maintained
- [ ] Error tracking implemented

**Monitoring:**
- [ ] Performance metrics monitored
- [ ] Error reporting configured
- [ ] Crash reporting tested
- [ ] Health checks updated

## 🔧 Configuration Changes

**Environment Variables:**
- [ ] New environment variables documented in .env.example
- [ ] Existing variables updated
- [ ] Deployment configuration updated
- [ ] Feature flags configured

**Dependencies:**
- [ ] New dependencies justified
- [ ] Dependency versions locked
- [ ] Security audit passed
- [ ] Bundle size impact acceptable

## 🚀 Deployment

**Deployment Checklist:**
- [ ] Staging deployment tested
- [ ] Database migrations (if applicable)
- [ ] Environment configuration updated
- [ ] Rollback plan prepared

**Release Notes:**
- [ ] User-facing changes documented
- [ ] Breaking changes noted
- [ ] Migration instructions provided
- [ ] API changes documented

## ♿ Accessibility

**Accessibility Testing:**
- [ ] Screen reader compatibility
- [ ] Keyboard navigation
- [ ] Color contrast compliance
- [ ] Font scaling support
- [ ] Voice control support

**WCAG Compliance:**
- [ ] Level A compliance
- [ ] Level AA compliance (target)
- [ ] Level AAA compliance (if applicable)

## 📚 Documentation

**Documentation Updates:**
- [ ] README.md updated
- [ ] API documentation updated
- [ ] Code comments added/updated
- [ ] Architecture documentation updated
- [ ] User guides updated

**Code Documentation:**
- [ ] Functions/methods documented
- [ ] Complex logic explained
- [ ] Type definitions updated
- [ ] Examples provided

## 🤝 Recovery App Specific

**Recovery Features:**
- [ ] Supports recovery journey
- [ ] Maintains user privacy
- [ ] Promotes positive outcomes
- [ ] Follows evidence-based practices
- [ ] Culturally appropriate for Thai users

**User Safety:**
- [ ] Crisis intervention features working
- [ ] Emergency contacts accessible
- [ ] Content warnings where appropriate
- [ ] Harmful content prevented

## ✅ Checklist

**Code Quality:**
- [ ] Code follows project style guidelines
- [ ] No console.log statements left in code
- [ ] No commented-out code blocks
- [ ] TypeScript types properly defined
- [ ] Error handling implemented

**Review Readiness:**
- [ ] Self-review completed
- [ ] Commit messages are clear and descriptive
- [ ] Branch is up to date with main/develop
- [ ] No merge conflicts
- [ ] CI/CD pipeline passes

**Team Collaboration:**
- [ ] Relevant team members tagged for review
- [ ] Breaking changes communicated
- [ ] Dependencies on other PRs noted
- [ ] Design review completed (if UI changes)

## 🔍 Review Focus Areas

**Please pay special attention to:**
- Specific areas you want reviewers to focus on
- Complex logic implementations
- Security-sensitive changes
- Performance-critical sections

## 🚨 Known Issues

**Temporary limitations or known issues:**
- Issue description and tracking number
- Planned resolution timeline
- Workaround instructions

## 📝 Additional Notes

**Additional context or information:**
- Architectural decisions made
- Alternative approaches considered
- Future improvements planned
- Technical debt addressed/created

---

**Reviewer Guidelines:**
- Test thoroughly on multiple platforms
- Verify accessibility requirements
- Check security and privacy implications
- Ensure localization works correctly
- Validate performance impact
- Review code quality and documentation
